# TextMine Documentation

This docs site is organized for humans and agents. Prefer the current product sections over archive pages.

## Current sections

- Product map: /getting-started/product-map
- Workbench: /workbench/overview
- Vault: /vault/overview
- Legislate: /legislate/overview
- Workflows: /workflows/overview
- Integrations: /integrations/overview
- Workbench MCP providers: /integrations/workbench-mcp-providers
- TextMine MCP server: /integrations/textmine-mcp-server
- Playbooks: /playbooks/overview
- Records: /records/overview
- Agents: /agents/overview
- Scribe: /scribe/overview
- Permissions: /administration/permissions

## Archive

Original Intercom articles are preserved under /archive/intercom and may contain older terminology.
